'''竏嗄-th-g-k''' ('''kamathgekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:variate|variate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-th-g-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:variate|variate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗄-th-g-k
|-
! Lemma
| kamathgekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimathgekoko|thimathgekoko]] || [[word:jimathgekoko|jimathgekoko]] || [[word:shimathgekoko|shimathgekoko]] || [[word:kimathgekoko|kimathgekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumathgekoko|thuthumathgekoko]] || [[word:jujumathgekoko|jujumathgekoko]] || [[word:shushumathgekoko|shushumathgekoko]] || [[word:kukumathgekoko|kukumathgekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumathgekoko|thumathgekoko]] || [[word:jumathgekoko|jumathgekoko]] || [[word:shumathgekoko|shumathgekoko]] || [[word:kumathgekoko|kumathgekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumathgekoko|thumathgekoko]] || [[word:jumathgekoko|jumathgekoko]] || [[word:shumathgekoko|shumathgekoko]] || [[word:kumathgekoko|kumathgekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themathgekoko|themathgekoko]] || [[word:jemathgekoko|jemathgekoko]] || [[word:shemathgekoko|shemathgekoko]] || [[word:kemathgekoko|kemathgekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomathgekoko|thothomathgekoko]] || [[word:jojomathgekoko|jojomathgekoko]] || [[word:shoshomathgekoko|shoshomathgekoko]] || [[word:kokomathgekoko|kokomathgekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomathgekoko|thomathgekoko]] || [[word:jomathgekoko|jomathgekoko]] || [[word:shomathgekoko|shomathgekoko]] || [[word:komathgekoko|komathgekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomathgekoko|thomathgekoko]] || [[word:jomathgekoko|jomathgekoko]] || [[word:shomathgekoko|shomathgekoko]] || [[word:komathgekoko|komathgekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦmathgekoko|thﾃｦmathgekoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦmathgekoko|jﾃｦmathgekoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦmathgekoko|shﾃｦmathgekoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦmathgekoko|kﾃｦmathgekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamathgekoko|thathamathgekoko]] || [[word:jajamathgekoko|jajamathgekoko]] || [[word:shashamathgekoko|shashamathgekoko]] || [[word:kakamathgekoko|kakamathgekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamathgekoko|thamathgekoko]] || [[word:jamathgekoko|jamathgekoko]] || [[word:shamathgekoko|shamathgekoko]] || [[word:kamathgekoko|kamathgekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamathgekoko|thamathgekoko]] || [[word:jamathgekoko|jamathgekoko]] || [[word:shamathgekoko|shamathgekoko]] || [[word:kamathgekoko|kamathgekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shamathgekithi|shamathgekithi]] || [[word:shamathgekiji|shamathgekiji]] || [[word:shamathgekishi|shamathgekishi]] || [[word:shamathgekiki|shamathgekiki]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shamathgekotho|shamathgekotho]] || [[word:shamathgekojo|shamathgekojo]] || [[word:shamathgekosho|shamathgekosho]] || [[word:shamathgekoko|shamathgekoko]]

|-

|-

|-

|}
